previewItems.biography: Business coach, cleaning business owner, franchisor & entrepreneur, I’m passionate about business & passionate about helping cleaning business owners!

latestPosts.caption:
Friday Focus Tip #40: The Art of Saying No

Not every enquiry is a good fit. And that's okay.

A lot of cleaning business owners say yes to everything because they're afraid of losing income. But the wrong clients cost you more than they're worth.

The wrong client might:

• Expect endless discounts
• Complain about everything
• Demand last-minute changes
• Leave bad reviews
• Pull your team's energy down
• Eat into your profit margins

Your time and your team's sanity are valuable.

So before you say yes to a new client, ask yourself:

Is this the right fit for my business? Will my team enjoy working for them? Can I deliver at my quality standard? Will they respect my pricing?

If the answer to any of those is no, it's okay to say no.

The best cleaning businesses aren't the ones that take every job. They're the ones that take the right jobs.

Ready to attract and keep only your ideal clients? Book a free 30-minute coaching session and let's talk about building a client base that actually works for you.

Here’s the truth. Systems, not sweat, unlock real freedom and profit! 

I’ve built a cleaning business that works without me and I help others do the same.

Ready to see what’s possible for YOUR cleaning business? 

Book a free 30-minute coaching session today.

Ever feel buried under staff rotas and paperwork?

You’re not alone. Most cleaning business owners I speak to are juggling ringing phones, team dramas, and endless to-do lists. It’s exhausting. But you don’t have to do it all yourself.

If you’re ready to step back from the daily chaos and actually enjoy running your business, let’s chat. 

Message me to book your free 30-minute coaching session.

Systemise your cleaning business for real freedom!

What if you could step back, not step in? Most cleaning business owners stay stuck in daily chaos. Systemisation changes that.

Start with four pillars: Recruitment, Financials, Marketing, Operations. Tidy up one area each week. Small steps lead to big results.

Ready to see how it works in your business? Book a free 30-minute session today. 

Let’s make your business run without you!

Good Morning Monday! 

It's a fresh week, a fresh start, and a fresh opportunity to move your cleaning business forward. Whether you're working on systemising your operations, improving your profit margins, or building your dream team, today is the day to take that first step.

You've got this. Let's make this week count!

Friday Focus Tip #39: Build Your Operations Manual

If everything lives in your head, your business can't grow.

An operations manual is just a simple document that explains how things work. It's not fancy. It's not complicated. It's just clear.

What to include:

• How you onboard a new client
• How you train a new team member
• How you handle complaints
• How you check quality
• How you manage the rota
• How you process invoices
• What your standards are for every job type

When your team can follow a checklist instead of asking you every five minutes, everything changes.

You get your time back. Standards stay consistent. New people train faster. The business runs without you.

That's real freedom.

Ready to build your operations manual? Book a free 30-minute coaching session and let's start documenting what makes your business work.

Building a great team around you is one of the best investments you can make.

But here's the thing: a great team doesn't come from micromanaging. It comes from empowering them with clear systems, proper training and trust.

When your team knows exactly what good looks like, they don't need you breathing down their neck. They can get on with the work. That's when you get your freedom back!

Systems and training aren't just about making your team better. They're about making your life better too.

Ready to build a team that can run without you? Book a free 30 minute coaching session and let's talk about how.

Still doing everything yourself?

That is usually the point where growth starts to stall.

If you run a cleaning business and want more profit, better systems and more time back, I can help!

I work with cleaning business owners who are ready to step back from the day to day and build a business that runs more smoothly.

Book a free 30-minute intro session with me, and let’s talk about your goals, your challenges and the next best step for your business.

Feeling like the day never ends?

You’re not failing. You’re just carrying too much alone.

If payroll, rota changes, missed calls and staff issues are landing on your desk every day, it is no wonder your energy is gone by 5pm.

That does not mean your business is broken.

It means it may be time for better systems, clearer focus and a bit of support.

If that sounds familiar, message me and book a free 30-minute coaching session.

New week. New goals. New possibilities ahead.

What could change if you focused on just one small win this week? Sometimes, the biggest progress starts with the smallest shift.

Take a moment now. Set one clear goal for your business and yourself. If you need support or a fresh perspective, my inbox is open. Let’s make this week count!

Friday Focus Tip #38: Protect Your Profit Margins

Busy doesn't equal profitable. You can be fully booked and still broke.

The problem? Most owners focus on getting clients, not on protecting profit.

Here's what actually works:

• Know your true cost per clean (wages, travel, products, overheads, everything)
• Price to cover costs PLUS 25% profit minimum
• Review pricing regularly (costs go up, so should your rates)
• Say no to jobs that don't work for your margins
• Track which clients are actually profitable
• Don't compete on price (compete on quality and reliability)

The owners making real money aren't working harder. They're working smarter about their numbers.

Your profit is what lets you invest in your team, take time off, and actually enjoy the business.

Ready to get your pricing and margins right? Book a free 30-minute coaching session and let's make sure your business is truly profitable.

You don't have to figure it all out on your own!

Running a cleaning business can feel lonely, especially when everyone is looking to you for answers.
